creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Committed, but please note that it doesn't build with python3:
===>  Configuring for py36-python-gist-0.4.7
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "<string>", line 1, in <module>
  File "setup.py", line 18, in <module>
    long_description=(open('README.rst').read()),
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.6/encodings/ascii.py", line 26, in decode
    return codecs.ascii_decode(input, self.errors)[0]
UnicodeDecodeError: 'ascii' codec can't decode byte 0xc3 in position 9191: ordinal not in range(128)
*** Error code 1

Please notify upstream about this issue. It's common problem and easy to fix.
